baseRefNote: Wave-2 baseRef = 1b4f49b (the post-wave-1 integration of crm + state-int + procurement + fleet-greens + docs-partial clusters). ant/main @ 6f7ff05 is a separate lineage and is NOT the base — workers must branch from 1b4f49b to stay on the 10.8 (e) + 10.9 (d) lineage.
launcherCommand: claude --model sonnet --dangerously-skip-permissions --add-dir {repo_root} --append-system-prompt "You are a worker in the phase10-9 (d) e2e content fix wave-2. Your only job is to fix the e2e test failures in the spec files you are assigned. Do NOT add debug instrumentation (console.log, page.evaluate for __errors, page.on('request'/'console'/'pageerror') etc.) — a prior worker wasted 48 minutes in a debug loop. Either fix the locator and confirm with a run, or report the spec unfixable and move on. Do NOT touch web-modern/e2e/_helpers.ts, playwright.config.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, or any web-modern/src/** source. All fixes are in test code (the assigned spec files only). Commit your work to the worktree branch and push to ant. Write status.md with STATUS: PASS (or FAIL with reason) and a handoff.md with details."

workers.name: apps
workers.task: Fix the 19 carry-forward e2e test-content failures in `web-modern/e2e/apps.spec.ts`. Run `cd web-modern && START_FASTIFY=1 pnpm playwright test apps` and capture the failure list. For each failure, run headed (`--headed --debug`) to see the actual DOM, then update the test assertions to match (do NOT touch src/). If all 19 turn out to be ECONNREFUSED-class (server not up) and they pass with Fastify up, commit a no-op and report. Run the audit gate suite: typecheck, build, i18n:extract, vitest, full playwright. Branch: wip/phase10-9-e2e-content-fixes-w2-apps. Tag: phase10-9-e2e-content-fixes-w2-apps-v1. Push: ant. Do NOT use mcp__claude-in-chrome__* tools. Do NOT add debug instrumentation. Do NOT spawn subagents. Report handoff and status at .orchestration/phase10-9-e2e-content-fixes-w2/apps/{handoff.md,status.md}.
